title: U8000F 55 Inch Crystal Uhd 4K Smart Tv Ua55U8000Fusmm
features: The Best-in-class, crystal clear choice
Key features at a glance
Picture Quality
Feel every shade of color as intended in powerful 4K
See every shade of color in all its original glory with our advanced processor. Plus, powerful 4K upscaling ensures you get up to a 4K resolution for the content you love.
Feel the reality of the world on screen
Make out the small details in every scene. 4K UHD resolution has 4x more pixels than regular FHD resolution — creating sharp, ultra-realistic images.
More aboutPicture Quality
Design
An elegant metal design that upgrades your space
Inspired by aircraft design, this TV features a luxurious metal body. A single sheet of metal is used to create the slim bezel, enabling a truly immersive experience.
One UI Tizen
Personalize your screen experience

One UI Tizen delivers a seamless and consistent Samsung device experience. Our operating system, Samsung Tizen OS, lets you take advantage of the latest innovative Samsung features — including quick access to the content you love, convenient AI management and powerful protection with Samsung Knox Security. Plus, One UI Tizen will support Tizen OS upgrades for next seven years, bringing you the latest apps & services.
Enjoy 7 years ofnew TV experiencesfor free
Your privacy. Secured.

Your privacy is secure on Samsung TVs. Sensitive data like passwords are protected, connected IoT devices are monitored and malicious apps and sites are automatically blocked. Plus, Samsung's security team helps keep your TV safe with constant updates.
Gaming Experience
Improved picture clarity with smooth motion
Experience a clear picture as your TV estimates the movement between frames, then uses that information to improve motion smoothness for subsequent frames.
Smart Experience
Connect and manage your smart home devices, from your TV

With a built-in smart hub, your TV can connect and control smart devices — even those requiring Matter and HCA compatibility. You can also get information about your smart home straight from the screen, including real-time summaries and suggestions for optimization.
More aboutSmartThings
Sound
Enjoy sound optimized to your content
Adaptive Sound has audio scenic intelligence that optimizes sound based on real-time scene analysis by content type.
Sustainability
Save energy with intelligent analysis

Energy saving made easy with SmartThings. By turning on AI Energy Mode, it auto detects surrounding light levels and analyzes usage behaviors to adjust the brightness. Also, it analyzes the content scene-by-scene to subtly adjust brightness where possible, to manage energy consumption.

specifications.Multi Device Experience: Mobile to TV, Sound Mirroring, Wireless TV On
specifications.Low Vision Support: Audio Description, Zoom Menu and Text, High Contrast, SeeColors, Color Inversion, Grayscale, Auto Picture Off
specifications.Hearing Impaired Support: Closed Caption (Subtitle), Multi-output Audio, Sign Language Zoom
specifications.Motor Impaired Support: Slow Button Repeat, Remote Control App. for All
